about.subtitle: About me
about.title: Nice to meet you, I'm Matheus
about.paragraph_1: I'm a Full Stack Developer with 2 years of experience, with a focus on front-end, building modern, intuitive, and well-structured interfaces. I also have experience with back-end and databases, which allows me to work end-to-end in development.
about.paragraph_2: Currently, I'm part of the Yup Chat team, where I led the front-end development of the platform's new interface, contributing to a more modern, intuitive experience aligned with the product's needs. I work closely with the back-end in PHP/Laravel and SQL databases, actively participating in the platform's continuous evolution.
about.paragraph_3: I have a degree in Systems Analysis and Development from Unisanta and started my technical journey back in high school through the Digital Games program integrated with ETEC. I continue to evolve through ongoing studies and specializations at Alura, along with knowledge in digital marketing and online presence, expanding my perspective on how technology can drive businesses and deliver real results.

timeline.title: Career journey
timeline.description: Follow the evolution of my journey in tech, from my early studies to my most recent professional experiences.

software_dev.title: Junior Software Developer
software_dev.description: I work as a Full-Stack Developer at Yup Chat, contributing to new feature development, bug fixes, code refactoring, and performance improvements. I collaborate with a multidisciplinary team focused on scalable and innovative solutions.

support.title: IT Support
support.description: I worked in IT support, solving technical issues, meeting user needs, and ensuring systems operated properly. This experience gave me a deeper understanding of end users' needs.

college.title: Systems Analysis and Development
college.description: I completed my higher education in Systems Analysis and Development at Unisanta, where I gained solid knowledge in programming, databases, systems analysis, and software development methodologies.

internship.title: Intern
internship.description: I started my professional journey at Yup Chat as an intern, where I applied what I learned in college and developed practical skills in a real business environment, taking part in projects and learning from experienced professionals.

technical_course.title: Digital Games Technician
technical_course.description: During high school, I studied Digital Games at ETEC, where I had my first contact with programming and software development. This experience was essential in shaping my path in tech.
